title: P.V. Sindhu Advances to Japan Open Final After Chen Yufei Retirement
indian_angle: India's top shuttler P.V. Sindhu has secured a spot in a prestigious BWF Super 750 final, boosting hopes for a title.
summary: P.V. Sindhu progressed to the Japan Open 2026 final after her opponent Chen Yufei retired hurt while Sindhu was leading 21-19, 15-10.

title: Sindhu Focused on Japan Open Final After Dominant Semifinal Performance
indian_angle: P.V. Sindhu's post-match comments provide insight into her mindset as she prepares for a major final.
summary: P.V. Sindhu expressed the importance of focus after her dominant semifinal performance against Chen Yufei, which saw her advance to the Japan Open 2026 final.

title: P.V. Sindhu vs Akane Yamaguchi: Head-to-Head Ahead of Japan Open Final
indian_angle: This article details the historical rivalry between P.V. Sindhu and Akane Yamaguchi, crucial for Indian fans anticipating the Japan Open final.
summary: A comprehensive look at the head-to-head record, match results, and key statistics between P.V. Sindhu and Akane Yamaguchi as they prepare to face off in the Japan Open 2026 final.

title: Why Badminton Needs Gen Z, Gen Alpha Watchers at Delhi World Championships
indian_angle: The article discusses strategies to engage younger audiences for the upcoming World Championships in Delhi, highlighting India's role as a host.
summary: An analysis of why badminton needs to attract Gen Z and Gen Alpha viewers, particularly with the World Championships scheduled to be held in Delhi.

title: Badminton's 3x15 Scoring to Debut at Ernakulam for Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This marks a significant rule change for all domestic badminton tournaments in India, starting with Ernakulam, impacting Indian players.
summary: The new 3x15 scoring format will be implemented across all domestic badminton tournaments in India, with its debut scheduled for Ernakulam.
